test.note: Integration tests in internal/cli require external services (Protheus SQL Server). Unit tests pass. ObservableCommand unit test passes.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance on Prometheus metrics conventions: LabeledCounters and CommandMetrics types should be used for new metrics. Include pattern for bucket boundaries (use ms <= bucket semantics).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: observability-metrics review found that architecture.md mentions 'Metrics: counter y histogram' but doesn't detail implementation conventions. Workers extending metrics lack guidance.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Investigate skill discovery discrepancy: backend-worker skill exists at .factory/skills/backend-worker/SKILL.md but workers report it as not found. May need to fix skill registration/loading mechanism.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both observability features specified 'backend-worker' skill but workers reported it doesn't exist.
